allDescriptions: Sensors, barcode readers, vision systems

As a leading supplier of sensors, measuring systems, laser markers, microscopes, and machine vision systems worldwide, KEYENCE is at the forefront of factory automation. They strive to develop innovative and reliable products to meet the needs of their customers in every manufacturing industry.  In addition to their world-class products, KEYENCE offers a full range of services to further assist their customers. Their technically trained direct sales force is able to solve tough applications and answer technical questions about their products. They also provide fast shipping so customers can improve their processes as quickly as possible. KEYENCE is dedicated to adding value to their customers by combining superior technology with unparalleled support.
KEYENCE is an electronic equipment manufacturing company.

Keyence Corporation develops and sells factory automation sensors, machine vision systems, barcode readers, program logic controllers, laser markers, measuring instruments, and digital microscopes. It serves customers in automotive, metals and machining, semiconductors and electronics, food, pharmaceuticals, and other industries.

Keyence Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells electronic application equipment. It offers photoelectric, fiber optic, laser, positioning, vision, and inductive proximity sensors; network communication units; measurement sensors, such as laser displacement and profiler/3D laser snapshot sensors, optical/laser micrometers, inductive displacement sensors, 3D interference measurement sensors, spectral interference displacement sensors, inductive displacement sensors, and LVDT/contact displacement sensors. It also provides machine vision systems and sensors; pressure, flow, level, temperature sensors, and flow meters; and safety equipment consists of light curtains, interlock switches, laser scanners, and controllers. In addition, the company provides microscopes, including digital microscopes, laser-based elemental analyzers, all-in-one fluorescence microscopes, 3D surface profilers, and automated colony counters; and optical metrology systems, include image dimension and multisensor measurement systems. Further, it offers 3D measurement systems comprising 3D scanners, wide area CMMs, handheld probe coordinate measuring machines, and 3D optical profilometers and surface profilers; and control products, include programmable logic controllers, micro/small PLCs, HMIs, servo motors/systems, and other controls. The company provides marking/coding products, such as 3-axis hybrid and CO2 laser markers, continuous inkjet printers, 3-axis fiber and UV laser markers, case coders, UV laser coders, and telecentric green laser markers; barcode readers comprising AI-powered scan tunnel systems, logistics, 1D/2D readers, rugged industrial handheld readers, handheld DPM readers, and handheld code readers; and mobile and handheld computers. It offers data acquisition systems, such as multi-input data loggers; static eliminators/ionizers and electrostatic sensors; and Navigation RPA. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

KEYENCE Corp. engages in the development, manufacture and sale of industrial automation and inspection equipment. It operates through the Manufacture and Sale of Electronic Equipment and Others business divisions. The Manufacture and Sale of Electronic Equipment division handles software development and product sales through its subsidiaries. The Others division deals with real estate, advertising, and marketing businesses through its subsidiaries. The company was founded by Takemitsu Takizaki in March 1972 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
Industrial Manufacturers in Itasca, IL.

When it comes to factory automation, sensors provide the sweet cadence for Keyence. Established in 1974, Keyence manufactures a slew of sensors, machine vision and measurement systems, barcode readers, microscopes, and laser markers. Its short list includes photoelectric sensors, pressure sensors, and ultrasonic sensors. A line for vision measurement offers optical micrometers, digital microscopes, and other products. Keyence also provides technical support and training to customers. Along with an online retail site, the company's global offices serve more than 200,000 customers worldwide; it generates most of its sales domestically.

allDescriptions: Visage Technologies is a world-renowned provider of specialized face tracking, analysis and recognition solutions used across various industries, including automotive, security and biometrics, retail, beauty, marketing research, and more. Our technology features face and head tracking, including state-of-the-art face detection, eye tracking (gaze tracking), face recognition, gender, age and emotion estimation, along with industry-beating support for all major platforms and embedded systems. A specialized division of the company exclusively collaborates with a major automotive safety supplier, developing algorithms for ADAS (Advanced Driver Assistance System). Visage Technologies AB is a private company that produces computer vision software for face tracking (head tracking, face detection, eye tracking, face recognition) and face analysis (age detection, emotion recognition, gender detection), along with a special business unit in automotive industry. The primary product of Visage Technologies is a multiplatform software development kit visageSDK.
Visage Technologies develops cutting-edge computer vision technology.

entity.description: ATHENAIS SA develops AI-based systems for automated visual inspection and predictive analytics in industrial environments. The company offers defect detection solutions that optimize Cognex ViDi and Halcon MVTec configurations from customer OK/NOK image sets using an unsupervised hyperoptimization approach. Its AIS platform supports deployment of automatic optical inspection systems with configurable hardware such as lenses, cameras, inkers, and illumination. ATHENAIS SA also provides predictive analytics tools for anomaly detection in IoT and other operational signals. The portfolio includes MAP Pilot for image collection and MAP Inspect for manual image tagging and labeling by client quality teams or Athenais specialists.

allDescriptions: ATHENAIS SA develops AI-based automated optical inspection, defect detection, and predictive analytics systems for industrial applications.

ATHENAIS SA develops AI-based systems for automated visual inspection and predictive analytics in industrial environments. The company offers defect detection solutions that optimize Cognex ViDi and Halcon MVTec configurations from customer OK/NOK image sets using an unsupervised hyperoptimization approach. Its AIS platform supports deployment of automatic optical inspection systems with configurable hardware such as lenses, cameras, inkers, and illumination. ATHENAIS SA also provides predictive analytics tools for anomaly detection in IoT and other operational signals. The portfolio includes MAP Pilot for image collection and MAP Inspect for manual image tagging and labeling by client quality teams or Athenais specialists.

Welcome to the new era of Automated Optical Inspection with deep learning.
contact@athenais.tech

Athenais Defects Detection and Predictive Analytics Systems
** Enhance your productivity with our Cognex Vidi / Halcon MvTec HyperOptimization software
- From your OK/NOK set of images our unsupervised HyperOptimization system will find the best Vidi or Halcon solution
- An AI driven approach that will beat all others parameters search.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
** Deploy your Automatic Optical Inspection system with our AIS plateform
- The lowest COO of AOI systems worlwide thanks to the Open Hardware concept
- Automatic turret with Mitutoyo BF/DF lens, APC Basler Camera, Xandex Inker and totally configurable illuminations
- MapPilot Client server architecture compatible with Cognex Vidi / Vision Pro and Halcon MvTec
- Capture images, detect defects, measure and inspect automatically

entity.description: PlatiScan VI provides automated optical inspection systems for industrial quality control and defect detection.
allDescriptions: PlatiScan VI provides automated optical inspection systems for industrial quality control and defect detection.

PlatiScan VI Automated Optical Inspection

Mit PlatiScan VI wurde ein neuartiges optisches Inspektionssystem (engl. visual inspection system) entwickelt.

Das System besteht aus einem handelsüblichen Windows-PC auf dem unsere spezielle Software installiert ist, die zur Auswertung der Bilder dient und die Bilderfassung wird realisiert durch eine herkömmliche Digitalkamera in einer individuell gewünschten Konfiguration als "Standalone" oder "Integrated" System.

Unser PlatiScan VI System wurde der menschlichen Vorgehensweise einer manuellen Sichtprüfung nachgebildet, so kann eine manuelle Sichtprüfung per Computer automatisiert werden. Hierdurch wird die Fehlererkennungsrate und die gesamte Testabdeckung deutlich erhöht.

Unter anderem sind bereits heute folgende Applikationen realisiert worden:

    * Board-Check
    * LED-Check
    * Display-Check
    * Jet-Test

Natürlich sind mit dem PlatiScan VI System auch andere Anwendungsgebiete möglich.
Sprechen Sie uns doch einfach heute noch an und lassen Sie sich über die Lösung Ihrer individuellen Testbedürfnisse beraten.

With more than 170 employees, MA micro automation GmbH is one of the leading international companies in the field of automation technology and special machine construction.
Our customers receive the complete production equipment, this includes individual consultation, the design and implementation of the systems, and of course on-site after-sales service.
Our strength: The implementation of customer-specific automation solutions in the fields of medical technology, opto-electronic components and after-sales service.
Our technology makes it possible: Thanks to the modular structure, the variety of applications and processes and the simple adaptability, we can react quickly to changes in market demand. In view of the ever shorter product life cycles, this is a major competitive advantage.
Whether driver assistance cameras or contact lenses - the component spectrum of the products manufactured on our systems usually comprises
Dimensions from 1x1x1 mm up to 100x100x100 mm
Weights from a few grams to 2 kg
Cycle times from 0.1 second
There are little things, such as distinct customer proximity, extremely high quality and a basis of mutual trust which make a big difference.

Tired of printing, sorting, filing, and searching reams of documents? Kofax would like to make your documents digital. The company makes electronic document capture (EDC) products that transform unwieldy paper-cut hazards into searchable and well-behaved bits and bytes by automating the process of capturing, processing, and distributing data and documents. Its products also enhance the manageability of electronic documents. The company's products are available through a network of more than 700 partners worldwide, as well as through its own sales and service operations. After a series of acquisitions that involved Lexmark International, Kofax was bought in 2018 by Thoma Bravo, a private equity firm, for $1.5 billion.
